title: helichrysum harennense
intro: Helichrysum harennense, also known as the Everlast Flower, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum harennense include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its healing potential. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting digestive health and reducing stress. Helichrysum harennense is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
